reviews.comment:
Baño en mal estado (cubículos fuera de servicio, agua en el piso, una sola bacha para lavarse las manos). Mucha espera para poder comprar 1 gaseosa porque atiende 1 sola persona. No la recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Bathroom in poor condition (stalls out of order, water on the floor, only one sink for handwashing). Long waits to buy a soda because only one person serves it. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxaTZPRWdBRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Para ser una estación de servicio de pasada, es completa, los baños si bien a la vista son feos, no puedo negar que están bien limpios, el kiosco que tienen ahí debería ser un poco más grande, aunque también tiene para sentarse un rato y la atención es muy buena

(Translated by Google)
For a passing gas station, it is complete, the bathrooms, although ugly at first glance, I cannot deny that they are very clean, the kiosk they have there should be a little bigger, although it also has a place to sit for a while and the service is very good
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxb2RLNy1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente un desastre… cargué combustible y huí!! No entré al sector del comedor. Así q no opino sobre eso. El Único muchacho que vi atendiendo muy amable y cordial, pero totalmente solo. Es imposible pensar que solo una persona pueda hacer todo! Las fotos hablan por sí mismas.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, it was a disaster… I filled up with gas and fled! I didn't go into the dining area, so I can't comment on that. The only young man I saw serving was very kind and friendly, but he was completely alone. It's impossible to think that just one person can do everything! The photos speak for themselves.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxek1mai1RRRAB
